---
title: "Ria Tang"
image: "files/photo.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yit029@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yihui-tang-5036843ab/
---

## Welcome to my website!

I am a graduate student in the Master of Science in Business Analytics program at UC San Diego.

I am interested in data analysis, visualization, and using data-driven methods to solve real-world business problems. 

Thank you for visiting, and I hope you enjoy exploring my site!
